creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 200189
djvulibre, adoption patch (correction 4)

- Removes CONFLICTS as the conflicting ports do not exist anymore since 2012.

- Adds USES=gnome when option DESKTOPFILES is on as it is requested by poudriere.

Now tested successfully with poudriere on 12.0-RELEASE i386/amd64 too.

(This version of the patch has the PORTREVISION bump. If it is not needed a committer will easily remove it: I think it is better to avoid having double versions of attachements each time a modification is necessary.)
